# Phase Task List Template (v1)

Use this structure for all `phase-*-implementation-task-list.md` planning docs.

## Required Top-Level Sections

1. `## Goal`
2. `## Scope Boundaries`
3. `## Recommended Implementation Order`
4. `## Definition of Done for Phase <N>`
5. `## Recommended First Commit Slice`

## Optional Top-Level Sections

- `## Parallelization Strategy`
- `## Phase <N-1> Carry-Over Issues / Preconditions`
- `## Workstream ...`
- `## Risks and Mitigations`
- `## Validation Snapshot`

## Template Markers

Every phase doc should include both markers directly under the H1 title:

- `<!-- PLAN:TEMPLATE v1 -->`
- `<!-- PLAN:SOURCE .github/plan/_phase-task-template.md -->`
